name: Mom
notes: She's my mom — we talk every week or so, more when something's going on. She knows what's happening in my life and I lean on her when stuff gets hard. She got me through the college app process and was anxious right alongside me. We've traveled a lot together and we're going to Taiwan and Japan this summer.

hobbies: going on walks regularly with my dad
context.cultural_context: Taiwanese family; maternal grandparents live in Taiwan

memories_together: Frequent vacations together over the years
Biannual trips to Taiwan together to visit grandparents (every other year, ongoing tradition)
She was there throughout high school keeping me on top of my work and pushing me to do my best
She supported me through the difficult college application process — helping me find people to learn from and editing my college essay
We were anxious together during the college acceptance letter phase — she was worried about where I'd end up too, and we shared that stress
important_events: Present at major life milestones — high school graduation, UCLA acceptance, and more
Biannual Taiwan trip — recurring family ritual every other year
things_to_look_forward_to: Travelling to Taiwan and Japan together in summer 2026
